headline: Reasons to Hold AngioDynamics Stock in Your Portfolio for Now
summary: ANGO's NanoKnife growth, strong Med Tech momentum and solid Q3 results support holding the stock despite tariff and inflation pressures.

headline: Revvity Launches Signals AI to Advance Scientific R&D Workflows
summary: RVTY expands AI capabilities in Signals software with Signals AI, designed to help scientists turn connected R&D data into actionable insights.
